title: festuca expansa
intro: Festuca expansa, also known as the broad-leaved fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Festuca expansa include soothing digestive issues, relieving respiratory problems, and reducing fever. Festuca expansa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is also used in the production of herbal supplements and essential oils.
